title: HYPERION. The cold ISM of rapidly growing $z>6$ quasars: diverse gas reservoirs, dust enrichment, and feedback signatures
comment: 23 pages; 18 figures, 6 tables. Claudia Maria Pierro, Roberta Tripodi: These authors equally contributed to this work
summary: Luminous QSOs at $z>6$ host some of the most rapidly assembled SMBHs in the early Universe. Characterizing their cold ISM is essential to determine their evolution. We investigate the molecular gas, cold dust, star formation, gas-to-dust ratio, and ionized ISM of ten HYPERION QSOs using new ALMA Band 3 observations targeting CO(6-5) and the underlying $\sim100$ GHz continuum, complemented by archival and literature ALMA/NOEMA data. We detect $\sim100$ GHz continuum emission in eight targets and CO(6-5) emission in four QSO hosts, J025-33, J083+11, J231-20, and J0252-0503, as well as in the companion of J231-20. The inferred molecular gas masses are of order $10^{10}~M_\odot$, while the non-detections imply upper limits of a few $10^9~M_\odot$, indicating a broad range of molecular reservoirs within the HYPERION population. For J025-33 and J083+11, the FIR SEDs are well sampled and yield low dust temperatures, $T_{\rm dust}=36^{+13}_{-7}$ K and $32^{+4}_{-3}$ K, respectively, well below the average value for $z>6$ QSOs. Combining gas and dust masses, we find a gas-to-dust ratio for J083+11, ${\rm GDR}=16^{+5}_{-4}$, among the lowest measured in a high-redshift QSO host. We also detect [NII]$λ205\,μ$m emission in J025-33 and tentatively in J083+11, suggesting dense or highly structured ionized gas. Finally, we identify a tentative connection among $T_{\rm dust}$, the X-ray photon index $Γ$, and the C IV velocity shift. These trends may indicate that more powerful winds redistribute dust away from the central AGN heating source, lowering its temperature and weakening the connection between the large-scale dust reservoir and the X-ray corona. Overall, HYPERION QSOs emerge as a heterogeneous population in which SMBH growth, star formation, gas consumption, enrichment, and feedback are not necessarily synchronized.

AI.motivation: 红移z>6的明亮类星体拥有宇宙早期快速增长的超大质量黑洞，表征其冷星际介质（ISM）特性对于理解这类天体的演化至关重要。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Band 3新观测数据，结合档案和文献中的ALMA/NOEMA数据，对10个HYPERION类星体进行CO(6-5)分子谱线及~100 GHz连续谱成像分析，并利用FIR SED拟合提取尘埃温度和气尘比等物理参数。

AI.conclusion: HYPERION类星体是一个高度异质的种群，其黑洞增长、恒星形成、气体消耗、金属增丰和反馈过程并不必然同步。尘埃温度与X射线及C IV发射的关联可能表明更强大的外流将尘埃从中心AGN加热源重新分布，降低了尘埃温度并削弱了大尺度尘埃储库与X射线冕之间的联系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 高红移（z>6）明亮类星体（QSO）拥有早期宇宙中一些增长最快的超大质量黑洞（SMBH）。表征其冷星际介质（ISM）对于确定其演化至关重要。我们利用新的ALMA Band 3观测数据，针对CO(6-5)谱线和约100 GHz连续谱，并结合档案及文献中的ALMA/NOEMA数据，研究了十个HYPERION类星体的分子气体、冷尘埃、恒星形成、气尘比以及电离态ISM。我们在八个目标中探测到约100 GHz连续谱发射，在四个QSO宿主（J025-33、J083+11、J231-20和J0252-0503）以及J231-20的伴星系中探测到CO(6-5)发射。推断的分子气体质量约为10^10太阳质量，而未探测到的目标给出了几个10^9太阳质量的上限，表明HYPERION种群内分子储库的范围很广。对于J025-33和J083+11，远红外（FIR）光谱能量分布（SED）采样良好，得出较低的尘埃温度，分别为36^{+13}_{-7} K和32^{+4}_{-3} K，远低于z>6类星体的平均值。结合气体和尘埃质量，我们发现J083+11的气尘比为16^{+5}_{-4}，这是在高红移类星体宿主中测量到的最低值之一。我们还在J025-33中探测到[NII] λ205 μm发射，并在J083+11中初步探测到，表明存在致密或高度结构化的电离气体。最后，我们初步识别出尘埃温度T_dust、X射线光子指数Γ和C IV速度偏移之间的关联。这些趋势可能表明，更强大的外流将尘埃从中心活动星系核（AGN）加热源重新分布，降低了其温度，并削弱了大尺度尘埃储库与X射线冕之间的联系。总体而言，HYPERION类星体表现为一个异质种群，其中SMBH增长、恒星形成、气体消耗、金属增丰和反馈过程并不必然同步。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：HYPERION类星体是一个高度异质的种群，其黑洞增长、恒星形成、气体消耗、金属增丰和反馈过程并不必然同步。尘埃温度与X射线及C IV发射的关联可能表明更强大的外流将尘埃从中心AGN加热源重新分布，降低了尘埃温度并削弱了大尺度尘埃储库与X射线冕之间的联系。

title: Probing Direct Contributions of Galaxies and AGN to Cosmic Reionization in a Quasar Field J0226+0302 with JWST NIRCam and NIRSpec
comment: Submitted to AAS Journals; 21 pages, 13 figures, 1 table. Comments are welcomed
summary: We present JWST Cycle 2 NIRCam and NIRSpec observations in a quasar field J0226+0302 at z=6.5412 to probe the direct connections between the intergalactic medium (IGM), galaxies, and AGN during reionization. This field was previously observed by the JWST ASPIRE program and eight [OIII]-emitting galaxies were detected at 5.3<z<6.4 with a single NIRCam pointing. Using new NIRCam and NIRSpec observations, we identify 65 additional line-emitting galaxies at 5.3<z<6.4. The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation function shows a ~2 sigma excess IGM transmission at ~10-40 cMpc from galaxies when compared with the average IGM transmission, suggesting a significant contribution from regions traced by star-forming galaxies to the local ionizing background during reionization. The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation function is consistent with THESAN simulations with an IGM neutral fraction of 5%-7% and an average ionizing photon escape fraction f_esc of 6% from galaxies. Among 49 line-emitting galaxies observed by NIRSpec, we identify four AGN through detection of broad H-alpha emission lines with an AGN fraction of (8+/-4)%. By measuring the IGM effective optical depth around the AGN and the IGM-AGN cross-correlation function, we find that the IGM transmission is higher within 5 cMpc/h of the AGN than around the majority of [OIII] emitters. We interpret the excess IGM transmission as resulting from the local radiation enhancement by the AGN, and estimate f_esc of 50%-100% of the AGN from the IGM-AGN cross-correlation function. Future JWST NIRSpec observations in quasar fields will yield a more constraining IGM-AGN cross-correlation function, providing further insights into the roles of galaxies and AGN in reionization.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST NIRCam和NIRSpec观测类星体场J0226+0302（z=6.5412），发现65个额外发射线星系，通过IGM-星系交叉相关函数发现星系周围IGM透射率超出约2σ，结合THESAN模拟推断IGM中性分数为5%-7%、星系平均逃逸分数为6%；同时识别出4个AGN（占比8±4%），发现AGN周围5 cMpc/h内IGM透射率更高，其逃逸分数达50%-100%。
AI.motivation: 探究再电离时期IGM、星系与AGN之间的直接联系，理解星系和AGN对再电离过程的贡献。
AI.method: 利用JWST NIRCam和NIRSpec新观测数据，识别发射线星系；计算IGM-星系交叉相关函数和IGM-AGN交叉相关函数；与THESAN模拟对比以约束中性分数和逃逸分数。
AI.result: 识别65个额外星系；IGM-星系交叉相关显示~2σ过剩透射率；模拟约束中性分数5%-7%、星系逃逸分数6%；发现4个AGN（8±4%），AGN周围IGM透射率更高，AGN逃逸分数50%-100%。
AI.conclusion: 星暴星系和AGN局域辐射对再电离有显著贡献，AGN的逃逸分数远高于星系；未来JWST NIRSpec观测可进一步约束IGM-AGN交叉相关函数。

title: Magnetic Fields in Massive Star-forming Regions (MagMaR). VII. On the dynamical importance of B-fields in massive protocluster W33 A
comment: Main text: 15 pages, 8 figures. Appendix: 3 pages. Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: Magnetic fields (B-fields) are likely important in massive protocluster formation, but their role remains poorly constrained. We present 1.2 mm ALMA full-polarization observations of W33 A, a massive star-forming region at 2.4 kpc, with an angular resolution of 0.3 arcsec (730 au). The region is resolved into 20 dense cores and 9 filaments. The plane-of-sky B-field, inferred from linearly polarized dust emission, shows diverse structures: two nearly perpendicular large-scale components oriented northwest-southeast (NW-SE) and northeast-southwest (NE-SW), and two localized features toward the millimeter peaks MM1 and MM2. The NW-SE component could be shaped by a molecular outflow. The NE-SW component is coherent along the main filaments F1, F-Main, and Tail, all of which show trans-Alfvenic turbulence. In F-Main, the line mass exceeds the turbulent critical value, implying that magnetic support is required to prevent radial collapse and suppress fragmentation. In F1 and Tail, turbulence alone can support the gas against gravity, although B-fields may provide additional support. Toward MM1, the B-field follows a spiral-like infalling streamer traced by CH3CN. The trans-Alfvenic state of the accreting gas suggests efficient magnetic damping of turbulence and a magnetically regulated, laminar accretion flow feeding the core. Toward MM2, the B-field shows an hourglass morphology fitted by parabolic curves. Two independent methods give a consistent field strength of about 8.1(1.9) mG, and virial analysis indicates that the B-field is dynamically important in delaying collapse of MM2. Within a single protocluster, B-fields can stabilize filaments, regulate accretion, and delay core collapse, highlighting their diverse dynamic role in high-mass star formation.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ALMA 1.2 mm全偏振观测，以730 au分辨率解析了W33 A大质量恒星形成区，揭示了磁场在丝状结构稳定、吸积调控和核心坍缩延迟中的多重动力学作用。
AI.motivation: 磁场在大质量原星团形成中可能起重要作用，但其具体角色尚不明确，因此需要对高分辨率观测下磁场的结构和动力学功能进行深入研究。
AI.method: 使用ALMA 1.2 mm全偏振观测对W33 A区域（距离2.4 kpc）进行成像，角分辨率0.3角秒（730 au），通过线性偏振尘埃辐射推断平面天空磁场结构，并结合CH3CN示踪气体运动进行综合分析。
AI.result: 识别出20个稠密核和9条纤维结构；发现两个近垂直的大尺度磁场分量（NW-SE和NE-SW）以及朝向MM1和MM2的局部磁场特征；在MM1中磁场呈螺旋状吸积流形态，在MM2中呈沙漏形态；通过两种独立方法测得MM2磁场强度约8.1 mG。
AI.conclusion: 磁场在大质量原星团中扮演多重的动力学角色：稳定纤维结构（如F-Main需磁场支持抗径向坍缩）、调控吸积流（MM1中磁阻尼维持层流吸积）、延迟核心坍缩（MM2中磁场在动力学上重要）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场在大质量原星团形成中可能很重要，但其作用仍缺乏约束。我们展示了W33 A（一个距离2.4 kpc的大质量恒星形成区）的1.2 mm ALMA全偏振观测，角分辨率为0.3角秒（730 au）。该区域被解析为20个致密核和9条纤维结构。从线性偏振尘埃辐射推断出的天平面磁场显示出多样结构：两个近乎垂直的大尺度分量分别指向西北-东南和东北-西南方向，以及朝向毫米波峰值MM1和MM2的两个局部特征。西北-东南分量可能由分子外流塑造。东北-西南分量沿主纤维F1、F-Main和Tail保持连贯，所有这些纤维都表现出跨阿尔芬湍流。在F-Main中，线质量超过湍流临界值，意味着需要磁支撑来防止径向坍缩并抑制碎裂。在F1和Tail中，仅湍流就能支撑气体对抗引力，尽管磁场可能提供额外支撑。朝向MM1，磁场遵循由CH3CN示踪的螺旋状下落流。吸积气体的跨阿尔芬状态表明湍流的有效磁阻尼以及一个磁调控的层流吸积流为核供料。朝向MM2，磁场呈现出由抛物线曲线拟合的沙漏形态。两种独立方法给出约8.1(1.9) mG的一致场强，维里分析表明磁场在延迟MM2坍缩方面具有动力学重要性。在单个原星团内，磁场可以稳定纤维、调控吸积并延迟核坍缩，突显了它们在大质量恒星形成中的多样化动力学作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：磁场在大质量原星团中扮演多重的动力学角色：稳定纤维结构（如F-Main需磁场支持抗径向坍缩）、调控吸积流（MM1中磁阻尼维持层流吸积）、延迟核心坍缩（MM2中磁场在动力学上重要）。

title: The Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 Phenomenon: Accretion State Versus Host Galaxy Properties
summary: The physical origin of the narrow-line Seyfert 1 (NLS1) and broad-line Seyfert 1 (BLS1) dichotomy remains debated, with competing scenarios invoking host-galaxy evolution or intrinsic accretion physics. We analysed host-galaxy properties and AGN luminosities obtained from CIGALE spectral energy distribution fitting for $\sim$12,000 Type 1 AGNs from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey, of which 29\% are NLS1s. Globally, NLS1s have lower virial black hole masses, higher inferred Eddington ratios, lower stellar masses, and higher specific star formation rates than BLS1s. In the FWHM(\Hb)--$L_{\rm AGN}$ plane, the conventional 2000 km s$^{-1}$ boundary is better viewed as an empirical division within a continuous parameter space rather than a physical threshold, with Fe~II tracing the high-accretion end. In a host-matched subsample of 767 NLS1--BLS1 pairs with statistically indistinguishable stellar mass, black hole mass, and redshift, NLS1s still show higher Eddington ratios, stronger Fe~II emission, and bluer optical continua, together with elevated SFR and dust attenuation, suggesting that the NLS1 phenomenon is most naturally associated with a high-accretion state within the continuous distribution of Type 1 AGNs, while host-galaxy gas supply may also play a role in modulating its strength. In this picture, NLS1 and BLS1 classifications reflect different locations within a continuous accretion sequence of the same underlying population rather than two physically disjoint classes.

AI.tldr: 通过对约12,000个Type 1 AGN（其中29%为NLS1）的CIGALE能谱拟合分析，发现NLS1和BLS1并非两种物理上独立的类别，而是同一连续吸积序列中的不同状态。在主机星系匹配样本中，NLS1仍表现出更高的爱丁顿比、更强的Fe II发射和更蓝的光学连续谱，支持NLS1现象与高吸积态相关的观点。
AI.motivation: 澄清窄线Seyfert 1星系(NLS1)与宽线Seyfert 1星系(BLS1)二分法的物理起源，特别是判断这种分类反映的是星系演化差异还是吸积物理的内在区别。
AI.method: 利用CIGALE对SDSS约12,000个Type 1 AGN进行能谱分布拟合，获取星系性质和AGN光度；通过主机星系匹配（匹配恒星质量、黑洞质量和红移）构建767对NLS1-BLS1配对样本进行比较分析。
AI.result: NLS1整体上具有更低的维里黑洞质量、更高的爱丁顿比、更低的恒星质量和更高的比恒星形成率。在主机匹配样本中，NLS1仍保持更高的爱丁顿比、更强的Fe II发射、更蓝的光学连续谱、更高的SFR和尘埃消光。FWHM(Hβ)-L_AGN平面上的2000 km/s边界本质上是连续参数空间的经验划分而非物理阈值。
AI.conclusion: NLS1和BLS1并非两个物理上独立的类别，而是同一底层AGN群体在连续吸积序列中不同位置的体现，其中NLS1对应高吸积态，而宿主星系的气体供应可能对增强该现象起到调节作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 窄线赛弗特1型（NLS1）与宽线赛弗特1型（BLS1）现象的物理起源仍存在争议，竞争性假说涉及宿主星系演化或内在吸积物理。我们分析了来自斯隆数字巡天约12,000个1型活动星系核（其中29%为NLS1）的CIGALE光谱能量分布拟合得到的宿主星系性质和活动星系核光度。总体而言，NLS1比BLS1具有更低的维里黑洞质量、更高的推断爱丁顿比率、更低的恒星质量和更高的比恒星形成率。在FWHM(Hβ)-L_AGN平面中，传统的2000 km/s边界更应被视为连续参数空间内的经验划分而非物理阈值，其中Fe II追踪高吸积端。在一个由767对NLS1-BLS1组成的、恒星质量、黑洞质量和红移统计上不可区分的宿主匹配子样本中，NLS1仍显示出更高的爱丁顿比率、更强的Fe II发射和更蓝的光学连续谱，以及更高的恒星形成率和尘埃消光，这表明NLS1现象最自然地与1型活动星系核连续分布中的高吸积态相关，而宿主星系的气体供应可能对其强度起调节作用。在此图景中，NLS1和BLS1分类反映了同一底层群体在连续吸积序列中的不同位置，而非两个物理上不相关的类别。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：NLS1和BLS1并非两个物理上独立的类别，而是同一底层活动星系核群体在连续吸积序列中不同位置的体现，其中NLS1对应高吸积态，而宿主星系的气体供应可能对增强该现象起到调节作用。

title: Galaxy Spiral Arm Count vs. Concentration and Mass: A First Look with Euclid
summary: Using catalogued information from Euclid Quick Data Release 1, we compare 2-armed and 3-armed spiral galaxies as classified by the Euclid Zoobot software. Two-armed galaxies have larger concentrations, lower stellar masses (M*), and lower star formation rates (SFRs) on average than 3-armed galaxies. For a given M*, 2-armed galaxies have larger concentrations than 3-armed galaxies. These trends have been seen before in nearby galaxies; with Euclid we extend the patterns to redshifts z = 0.4 - 1. Two-armed galaxies have lower SFRs because they have lower masses; at fixed M*, 2-armed and 3-armed galaxies have similar SFRs. We see a bend in the concentration-log M* relation for 2-armed galaxies at M* = 10^10.3 M(sun). Above this mass, 2-armed galaxies show significantly larger concentrations than their lower mass counterparts. The observed concentrations of 2-armed galaxies decrease with increasing redshift, perhaps from morphological K-corrections and resolution differences. About 60% - 70% of Euclid spirals are 2-armed, and about 15% - 20% are 3-armed. One-armed galaxies are rare, with low masses compared to 2-armed spirals. We compare these statistics with Galaxy Zoo Sloan Digital Sky Survey arm counts at low z, and tentatively with JWST at higher z. We discuss these results in terms of theoretical models of spiral arm generation and evolution, and compare with statistics of grand design, multi-armed, and flocculent galaxies. There is a need for more quantitative measurements of arm structure beyond arm counts provided by the Zoobot/Galaxy Zoo or the three standard arm classes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Euclid快速数据发布1中的分类信息，比较了由Zoobot软件识别的2旋臂和3旋臂旋涡星系，发现2旋臂星系具有更高的浓度、更低的恒星质量和恒星形成率，并将这些模式扩展到红移z=0.4-1。约60%-70%的Euclid旋涡星系为2旋臂，15%-20%为3旋臂。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 利用欧几里得快速数据发布1中的编目信息，我们比较了由欧几里得Zoobot软件分类的二臂和三臂旋涡星系。平均而言，二臂星系比三臂星系具有更大的浓度、更低的恒星质量（M*）和更低的恒星形成率（SFR）。在给定M*的情况下，二臂星系的浓度大于三臂星系。这些趋势在近邻星系中已有发现；借助欧几里得，我们将这些模式扩展至红移z = 0.4 - 1。二臂星系的SFR较低是因为其质量较低；在固定M*下，二臂和三臂星系的SFR相似。我们在M* = 10^10.3 M☉处观察到二臂星系的浓度-log M*关系出现弯曲。在此质量之上，二臂星系的浓度显著高于其低质量对应体。观测到的二臂星系浓度随红移增加而降低，这可能是由形态K改正和分辨率差异所致。约60% - 70%的欧几里得旋涡星系为二臂，约15% - 20%为三臂。单臂星系罕见，其质量低于二臂旋涡星系。我们将这些统计结果与低红移下的Galaxy Zoo斯隆数字巡天旋臂计数以及高红移下的JWST进行了初步比较。我们结合旋臂产生与演化的理论模型讨论了这些结果，并与宏大设计、多臂和絮状星系的统计进行了比较。除了Zoobot/Galaxy Zoo或三种标准旋臂类别提供的旋臂计数外，还需要对旋臂结构进行更定量的测量。

title: Tomography of the gamma-ray sky from cross-correlation with DESI DR2 and unWISE galaxies
summary: We study the origin of extragalactic gamma-ray emission observed by Fermi-LAT, using the cross-correlation of the gamma-ray sky with maps of large-scale structure provided by the DESI and unWISE surveys. Tomographic cross-correlation reveals the bias-weighted redshift distributions of gamma-ray sources. We first illustrate this method by cross-correlating detected gamma-ray point sources with large-scale structure. We find a significant cross-correlation and infer a point source redshift distribution broadly consistent with the distribution of identified optical counterparts previously reported in the literature, as well as a similar linear bias ($b \approx 2$) to massive galaxies that host bright active galactic nuclei. We then study the clustering of the Fermi unresolved gamma-ray background (UGRB), both in auto-correlation and in cross-correlation with large-scale structure. We detect the cross-correlation of the UGRB and LSS at $\sim 10σ$ in total, with highly significant detections from both DESI and unWISE. Our measurements suggest that the redshift distribution of the UGRB is broadly consistent with the redshift distribution of detected point sources. Additionally, we find a relatively weak amplitude for the cross-correlation with large-scale structure at z < 2, suggesting a significant fraction of the UGRB does not come from z < 2 large-scale structure. A natural candidate is contamination of from residual Galactic emission, and our best estimate of the contamination level derived from the UGRB auto-spectrum suggests that the mean bias of UGRB sources is indeed quite similar to the bias of detected Fermi point sources. However, we cannot exclude additional emission from gamma-ray sources at high redshift, z > 2, and we suggest that cross-correlation with tracers at z > 2, including CMB lensing, would be the ideal way to determine the fraction of z > 2 emission.

AI.tldr: 利用Fermi-LAT伽马射线数据与DESI、unWISE大规模结构巡天的层析交叉相关，研究了河外伽马射线背景的来源。发现已探测点源的redshift分布与光学认证的AGN宿主星系一致（偏置b≈2），而未分辨伽马射线背景（UGRB）的交叉相关信号显著（~10σ），但其z<2的幅度较弱，暗示大量UGRB可能来自银河系残余发射或高红移（z>2）源。
AI.motivation: 河外伽马射线背景的起源长期以来存在争议，不清楚主要来自已分辨的点源（如活动星系核）还是未分辨的暗弱源，以及银河系前景污染的贡献有多大。这项研究旨在通过层析交叉相关方法精确刻画伽马射线源的redshift分布和偏置参数，从而揭示其物理起源。
AI.method: 使用Fermi-LAT伽马射线数据与DESI和unWISE的大规模结构巡天进行层析交叉相关分析；分别对已探测到的伽马射线点源和未分辨伽马射线背景（UGRB）进行自相关与交叉相关测量，通过偏置加权的redshift分布推断源的物理性质。
AI.result: 1. 点源交叉相关显著，redshift分布与文献中已知的光学认证AGN宿主星系一致，线性偏置b≈2。2. UGRB与LSS的交叉相关达到~10σ置信度。3. UGRB的redshift分布与点源大致一致，但在z<2的交叉相关幅度较弱，表明大量UGRB并非来自z<2的大尺度结构。4. UGRB自相关谱的最佳拟合表明其平均偏置与点源相似，但无法排除z>2的高红移贡献。
AI.conclusion: UGRB的部分成分可能来自银河系残余发射，也有可能是高红移（z>2）的伽马射线源贡献。未来通过与更高红移示踪物（如CMB透镜）的交叉相关，可以有效区分这些成分。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用Fermi-LAT观测到的伽马射线天空与DESI和unWISE巡天提供的大尺度结构图的交叉相关，研究了河外伽马射线发射的起源。层析交叉相关揭示了伽马射线源的偏置加权红移分布。我们首先通过将探测到的伽马射线点源与大尺度结构进行交叉相关来演示该方法。我们发现了显著的交叉相关，并推断出点源的红移分布与文献中先前报告的光学对应体的分布大致一致，并且与宿主明亮活动星系核的大质量星系具有相似的线性偏置（b ≈ 2）。然后，我们研究了Fermi未分辨伽马射线背景（UGRB）的成团性，包括自相关和与大尺度结构的交叉相关。我们总共以约10σ的显著性探测到了UGRB与LSS的交叉相关，其中来自DESI和unWISE的探测均高度显著。我们的测量表明，UGRB的红移分布与探测到的点源的红移分布大致一致。此外，我们发现z < 2时与大尺度结构的交叉相关振幅相对较弱，表明UGRB的相当一部分并非来自z < 2的大尺度结构。一个自然的候选者是来自银河系残余发射的污染，而我们根据UGRB自谱得出的污染水平最佳估计表明，UGRB源的平均偏置确实与探测到的Fermi点源的偏置非常相似。然而，我们不能排除来自高红移（z > 2）伽马射线源的额外发射，我们建议与z > 2的示踪物（包括CMB透镜）进行交叉相关将是确定z > 2发射比例的理想方法。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，UGRB的部分成分可能来自银河系残余发射，也有可能是高红移（z>2）的伽马射线源贡献。未来通过与更高红移示踪物（如CMB透镜）的交叉相关，可以有效区分这些成分。

title: The Edge-on Galaxies in the DESI survey (EGIDE): sample building and photometry
comment: Accepted to the special issue "Unveiling the Structural Properties of Galaxies Using Contemporary Wide-Field Surveys" in MDPI Galaxies. Comments are welcome
summary: We present the EGIDE (The Edge-on Galaxies in the DESI survey) project - a catalogue of 149,215 edge-on galaxy candidates created using the data of the DESI Legacy Imaging Survey DR10 images. The catalogue size is ten times bigger than its predecessor and covers more than half of the sky. It is constructed in an automatic way utilizing the full power of manual annotations from the GalaxyZoo volunteers, implemented in the Zoobot neural model, which was fine-tuned to search for edge-on galaxies specifically. To ensure the credibility of the dataset, subsequent manual supervision was done. The EGIDE catalogue provides homogeneous SExtractor photometry in $griz$ bands, total stellar mass estimation, redshift values for 98% of the sample, star formation rates and other information. All of this is publicly available at The Edge-on Galaxy Database site. The preliminary analysis focused on differences between edge-on galaxies in the so-called blue sequence and red cloud populations. These galaxies demonstrate distinct properties: the number of redder galaxies drops with increasing $a/b$ ratio faster than for the bluer galaxies; galaxy thickness varies with galaxy colour: red sequence galaxies are thicker than blue cloud galaxies; the flattening ratio $q=b/a$ increases with total stellar mass $M_{\star}$ significantly only for redder cloud galaxies. It is an intriguing result, that the same trend of $q$ increasing for the high-mass end is detected from both the statistical models of figures of revolution and direct observations of edge-on galaxies in EGIDE independently. The full extent of the validity of this relationship can only be determined after correctly accounting for the contributions of the bulge and the PSF.

AI.tldr: EGIDE项目利用DESI Legacy Imaging Survey DR10影像和Zoobot神经网络模型，构建了一个包含149,215个侧向星系候选体的目录，规模是前身的10倍，覆盖超过半个天空，并提供了均匀测光、恒星质量、红移等公开数据。
AI.motivation: 现有侧向星系目录规模有限，亟需一个更大、更均匀的样本来研究侧向星系的物理性质及其在不同颜色族群（蓝序与红云）中的差异。
AI.method: 利用DESI Legacy Imaging Survey DR10影像，基于GalaxyZoo志愿者标注数据训练Zoobot神经网络模型，微调后自动识别侧向星系候选体，再辅以人工监督验证。使用SExtractor进行均匀测光，并估计恒星质量、红移和恒星形成率等参数。
AI.result: 构建了包含149,215个侧向星系候选体的目录（规模是前身的10倍，覆盖超过半个天空），98%样本有红移信息。发现红云星系数量随轴比a/b下降速度快于蓝序星系；红序星系厚度大于蓝云星系；扁平比q随恒星质量增加的趋势仅在红云星系中显著，且与理论模型独立吻合。
AI.conclusion: EGIDE目录为侧向星系研究提供了大规模、均匀的数据基础。初步分析揭示了蓝序与红云星系在厚度、扁平比等性质上的差异，其中q随质量增加的趋势得到理论与观测的独立验证，但需进一步考虑核球和PSF贡献以确认其有效性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了EGIDE（DESI巡天中的侧向星系）项目——一个利用DESI Legacy成像巡天DR10图像数据创建的包含149,215个侧向星系候选体的星表。该星表规模是其前身的十倍，覆盖超过一半的天空。它采用自动化方式构建，充分利用了GalaxyZoo志愿者的手动标注，这些标注被整合到Zoobot神经模型中，该模型经过微调专门用于搜索侧向星系。为确保数据集的可靠性，后续进行了人工监督。EGIDE星表提供了在griz波段均匀的SExtractor测光数据、总恒星质量估计、98%样本的红移值、恒星形成率及其他信息。所有这些数据均可通过侧向星系数据库网站公开获取。初步分析聚焦于所谓的蓝序和红云星系群中侧向星系之间的差异。这些星系表现出不同的性质：红色星系的数量随a/b比增加而下降的速度快于蓝色星系；星系厚度随星系颜色变化：红序星系比蓝云星系更厚；扁平比q=b/a仅对较红的云星系随总恒星质量M⋆显著增加。这是一个有趣的结果，即从旋转体统计模型和EGIDE中侧向星系的直接观测中独立检测到高质量端q增加的相同趋势。这一关系的全部有效性只有在正确考虑核球和PSF的贡献后才能确定。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，EGIDE目录为侧向星系研究提供了大规模、均匀的数据基础。初步分析揭示了蓝序与红云星系在厚度、扁平比等性质上的差异，其中q随质量增加的趋势得到理论与观测的独立验证，但需进一步考虑核球和PSF贡献以确认其有效性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Final distribution of edge-on galaxies from the EGIDE, found in the DESI DR10 footprint, over the sky in the equatorial coordinate system. The grey line symbolically represents the plane of our Galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：EGIDE在DESI DR10覆盖区域内发现的侧向星系在赤道坐标系中的最终天球分布。灰色线条象征性地表示我们银河系的盘面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Examples of objects classified as truly edge-on galaxies. Ellipses of different colours show segmentation by SExtractor in different bands. More images can be found in the EGIDE project site https://www.sao.ru/edgeon/catalogs.php?cat=EGIDE . More images can be found in Appendix D and in the EGIDE project site https://www.sao.ru/edgeon/catalogs.php?cat=EGIDE .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：被分类为真正侧向星系的示例。不同颜色的椭圆显示了SExtractor在不同波段的分割结果。更多图像可在EGIDE项目网站https://www.sao.ru/edgeon/catalogs.php?cat=EGIDE 以及附录D中找到。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of \(q\) versus Kron radius \(a_{r}\) in the \(r\) -band. In each plot, black contours show the density of EGIDE points (blue). The data are presented before PSF correction (a) and after correction (b, c, d). The horizontal line shows the boundary at \(q=0.1\) ; points shown in magenta are filtered out. In panels (c) and (d), coloured isolines show contours of constant relative error of the \(q=b/a\) after PSF correction estimated without and with a bulge, respectively. The magenta line indicates the adopted error threshold used in the text.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：q值与r波段Kron半径a_r的分布。在每个图中，黑色等高线显示EGIDE点（蓝色）的密度。数据分别在PSF校正前（a）和校正后（b, c, d）呈现。水平线表示q=0.1的边界；品红色点被滤除。在面板（c）和（d）中，彩色等值线分别表示在无核球和有核球情况下估计的PSF校正后q=b/a的相对误差常数等高线。品红线表示文中采用的误差阈值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Distributions of the photometric properties of galaxies in EGIDE (red hatched), EGIPS (blue), and the volume-limited subsample of EGIDE (green, for 5000 km/s \( 5 ). Presented values are the Kron radius in the \(r\) band (upper left, panel a ), apparent Petrosian magnitude in the \(r\) band (upper right, panel b ), colour \((g-r)\) (lower left, panel c ), and \(b/a\) ( \(q\) -value) in the \(r\) band (lower right, d ). In each panel, we also show the number \(N\) of galaxies in EGIPS and EGIDE that are greater than (or lower than) the displayed value, which is chosen as the median of the EGIPS distribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：EGIDE（红色阴影）、EGIPS（蓝色）和EGIDE的体积限制子样本（绿色，对应5000 km/s < cz < 15000 km/s，见第5节）中星系测光属性的分布。展示的值包括r波段的Kron半径（左上，面板a）、r波段的视Petrosian星等（右上，面板b）、颜色(g-r)（左下，面板c）以及r波段的b/a（q值）（右下，d）。在每个面板中，我们还显示了EGIPS和EGIDE中大于（或小于）显示值（选为EGIPS分布的中位数）的星系数量N。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Number of galaxies and median \(q=b/a\) value for EGIPS and EGIDE samples. Values are presented for each band under consideration for the whole samples, and additionally for the large ( \(a_{band}>20\) arcsec) galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：EGIPS和EGIDE样本的星系数量及中位q=b/a值。对于整个样本以及大星系（a_band > 20角秒），分别给出了每个考虑波段的值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The redshift distribution of edge-on galaxies for the EGIS (green), EGIPS (blue), and EGIDE (red hatched for the whole dataset and magenta for the smaller subsample with information from other surveys) samples. The median \(cz\) values for EGIPS and EGIDE are indicated by the vertical dashed lines. Each bin size is 500 km/s. For illustration purposes, we limit the figure to an 80000 km/s range, which contains 94% of the EGIDE sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：EGIS（绿色）、EGIPS（蓝色）和EGIDE（红色阴影为整个数据集，品红色为来自其他巡天的较小子样本）样本中侧向星系的红移分布。EGIPS和EGIDE的中位cz值由垂直虚线表示。每个bin大小为500 km/s。为便于说明，我们将图限制在80000 km/s范围内，该范围包含EGIDE样本的94%。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: The size of the intersection of the EGIDE sample with the surveys we are comparing with. The first column shows the acronym for the survey; the next columns show the reference, the intersection size, and the median Kron radius \(a_{r}\) of the galaxies in the intersection. The lower part of the table, below the horizontal line, is dedicated to the surveys included in the RCSEDv2 project.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：EGIDE样本与我们比较的巡天之间的交集大小。第一列显示巡天的缩写；后续列显示参考文献、交集大小以及交集中星系的中位Kron半径a_r。表格下半部分（水平线以下）专门用于RCSEDv2项目中包含的巡天。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left: Completeness function in the form of \(\log N\) versus \(\log a_{r}\) for EGIDE galaxies. Different colours show the whole sample (black), galaxies with colour \(0.7 Right: Cumulative distribution of apparent magnitude. Individual black lines correspond to the \(g\) , \(r\) , \(i\) , and \(z\) bands, and the line shows the linear fit in the given magnitude range for the \(r\) -band.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左图：EGIDE星系的log N与log a_r形式的完备性函数。不同颜色显示整个样本（黑色）、颜色0.7 < (g-r) < 1.2的星系（红色）和颜色0.2 < (g-r) < 0.6的星系（蓝色）。线条表示对整个分布的线性拟合。右图：视星等的累积分布。单独的黑色线条对应g、r、i和z波段，线条表示r波段在给定星等范围内的线性拟合。
